Label: develops AI system
Definition: Indicates that an actor develops an AI system.

Label: places AI system on market
Definition: Indicates that an actor places an AI system on the EU market.

Label: deploys AI system
Definition: Indicates that an actor deploys or uses an AI system.

Label: imports AI system
Definition: Indicates that an importer imports an AI system.

Label: distributes AI system
Definition: Indicates that a distributor distributes an AI system.

Label: subject to obligation
Definition: Indicates that an actor must comply with an obligation.

Label: applies to system
Definition: Indicates that an obligation applies to a category of AI system.

Label: supervises actor
Definition: Indicates that an authority supervises an actor.

Label: regulates system
Definition: Indicates that an authority regulates an AI system.

Label: enforces obligation
Definition: Indicates that an authority enforces compliance with an obligation.

Label: assesses conformity of AI system
Definition: Indicates that a notified body assesses conformity of an AI system.

Label: reports to authority
Definition: Indicates that an actor reports to a regulatory authority.
